# eventAttribution

**Instance Property**

An object you use to send tap event attribution data to the browser for Private Click Measurement.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var eventAttribution: UIEventAttribution? { get set }
```

## Discussion

For more information about preparing event attribution data, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIEventAttribution].

## Configuring a Safari View Controller

- **entersReaderIfAvailable**: A value that specifies whether Safari should enter Reader mode, if it is available.
- **barCollapsingEnabled**
